title: App Settings - General - Licenses no wifi  [New]
scenario: Verify license and source links in the app when offline show correct content for licenses but display an error for source links.
steps: Turn off WiFi and start the app.
Tap each license link (MIT, Apache 2.0, etc.).
Tap the Source link for each license.
expected: Each license link opens with headline, description, and Cancel (X) button visible in the upper right. Each Source link opens the corresponding source page.
